fields.label: Template Name
fields.description: Display name for this template

fields.label: Template Code
fields.description: Unique identifier (slug). Example: sales-premium, catalog-basic

fields.label: Template Type
fields.options:
Sales Presentation
Product Catalog
Technical Sheet
Marketing Flyer
Price List
Quotation
Customer Portal
E-commerce
Print Label
Specification Sheet
Comparison Sheet
Other
fields.description: Type of presentation template

fields.label: Enabled
fields.description: Enable or disable this template

fields.label: Is Default
fields.description: Set as default template for its type

fields.label: Sort Order
fields.description: Order in which templates appear (lower = first)

fields.label: Customer Type
fields.options:
B2B
B2C
Wholesale
Retail
Distributor
Reseller
End User
All
fields.description: Target customer segment for this template

fields.label: Target Segment
fields.description: Specific market segment this template is designed for

fields.label: Channel
fields.description: Sales or marketing channel this template is for

fields.label: Locale
fields.description: Language/locale this template is designed for

fields.label: Product Family
fields.description: Apply this template only to specific product family

fields.label: Category
fields.description: Apply this template only to specific category

fields.label: Brand
fields.description: Apply this template only to specific brand

fields.label: Collection
fields.description: Apply this template only to specific collection

fields.label: Output Format
fields.options:
HTML
PDF
Print
Email
JSON
XML
fields.description: Primary output format for this template

fields.label: Page Size
fields.description: Page size for print/PDF output

fields.label: Orientation
fields.description: Page orientation for print/PDF

fields.label: Show Images
fields.description: Include product images in template

fields.label: Show Pricing
fields.description: Include pricing information in template

fields.label: Show Technical Specs
fields.description: Include technical specifications

fields.label: Show Variants
fields.description: Include variant options in template

fields.label: Included Fields
fields.description: Comma-separated list of field names to include. Leave blank for all fields.

fields.label: Excluded Fields
fields.description: Comma-separated list of field names to exclude.

fields.label: Field Order
fields.description: Comma-separated list defining field display order.

fields.label: Custom Field Labels
fields.description: JSON object mapping field names to custom labels. Example: {"product_name": "Item Name"}

fields.label: Header HTML
fields.description: HTML content for template header. Use {{variables}} for dynamic content.

fields.label: Body Template
fields.description: Main HTML template body. Use Jinja2 syntax: {{ product.product_name }}, {% for item in items %}

fields.label: Footer HTML
fields.description: HTML content for template footer. Use {{variables}} for dynamic content.

fields.label: Custom CSS
fields.description: Custom CSS styles for this template

fields.label: Primary Color
fields.description: Primary brand color for template

fields.label: Secondary Color
fields.description: Secondary accent color

fields.label: Font Family
fields.description: CSS font-family value. Example: Arial, sans-serif

fields.label: Preview Product
fields.description: Product to use for template preview

fields.label: Preview
fields.description: Click 'Generate Preview' to see template output

fields.label: Valid From
fields.description: When this template becomes active

fields.label: Valid To
fields.description: When this template expires

fields.label: Version
fields.description: Template version number

fields.label: Last Used Date
fields.description: When this template was last used

fields.label: Usage Count
fields.description: Number of times this template has been used

fields.label: Description
fields.description: Detailed description of this template and its intended use

fields.label: Usage Instructions
fields.description: Instructions for using this template

fields.label: Internal Notes
fields.description: Internal notes visible only to administrators
